beats.activity: Wake up, coffee on the porch, check weather and mood
beats.reasoning: Sunday morning ritual—low-key start, energy still recovering from yesterday's ER shift and evening out. Perfect weather forecast (sunny, 72F) sets the tone for an outdoor-focused day.
Fitness obsession + perfect sunny weather + low crowd on Sunday morning = early run while neighborhood is quiet, builds energy for the day.
Recovery and refuel after run; time to transition into the rest of the day.
Short drive/walk from Wallingford; iconic Seattle park with water views, perfect for a calm Sunday morning with excellent weather.

beats.activity: Leisure at Gas Works Park—walk, sit by water, people-watch
beats.reasoning: Sunny Sunday, no crowds yet, water views and open space align with her love of nature and quiet reflection. Values time to decompress after ER shift.
Heading to her workplace neighborhood; scenic drive along the water, reasonable Sunday traffic.

beats.activity: Lunch at a casual spot in Ballard, possibly solo or a quiet table to write letters
beats.reasoning: Generous with money, enjoys good food; Ballard has excellent casual restaurants. Time to sit, eat well, and possibly hand-write a letter—a reflective Sunday activity.
Return to Wallingford for afternoon brewing project; calm Sunday energy supports creative hobby time.

beats.activity: Home brewing—check fermentation, prep ingredients, experiment with a new batch
beats.reasoning: Obsessed with brewing; Sunday afternoon is ideal for hands-on hobby work. Low energy day means staying home fits her mood and allows deep focus.

beats.activity: Evening walk around the neighborhood, grab dinner ingredients
beats.reasoning: Short neighborhood errand while weather is still perfect (72F, sunny); walk extends her fitness day and combines errand with leisure.

beats.activity: Cook dinner and eat at home, perhaps catch up on video games
beats.reasoning: Low-energy Sunday wind-down; cooking and a meal align with her generous, intentional approach to self-care. Gaming is her other major hobby.

world_event_prompt: Calm, sunny Sunday, high of 72F. Quiet end-of-week day with no major disruptions. Lake Union sees heavy recreational boat and paddle traffic in the afternoon.
